name: Snickers Bar Brownie Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Snickers bar; large bag or Milky Way bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake mix with melted margarine and condensed milk.
2. Spread half of the mixture into a 9x13" pan. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
3. Slice the candy bars into small pieces. Lay these on top of the baked crust.
4. Crumble the remaining batter and sprinkle it over the candy bars.
5. No need to spread it smoothly. Put the pan back into the oven and bake at 350°F for another 20 minutes.
